name: xf_cep_pn_annihilation_set
drl: rule NE when not D() P() then end
_finding: OPEN residual (D-158, pre-existing — fails identically on the pre-port base; SET-level, so outside the PnShadow reorder port): a same-epoch explicit plain-D insert+delete pair over `not D() P()` in a STREAM session. Drools stages the pair on the not until an eval — addDelete ANNIHILATES the staged insert, so the not never blocks and nothing re-fires (6 firings). The engine stream-flushes the D insert per-arrival (blocks at the insert, releases at the delete) and re-fires the whole join memory (12 firings). Fix class: defer plain not-blocker staging to the fire eval (the lazy plain staging Drools uses) — a follow-on semantic port, not a pick reorder. 37/3,100 population scenarios (all SET, all pre-existing) share this family.
